channel.title: The Jiffy Book Club: Glorious Country
channel.description: A six-part audio companion to The Jiffy Book Club's inaugural selection: "Glorious Country: How the Artist Frederic Church Brought the World to America and America to the World," by Victoria Johnson. Produced by The Jiffy, an independent newsletter and podcast covering the arts and sciences of upstate New York, and hosted by James Cave.
channel.itunes:author: James Cave

image.title: The Jiffy Book Club: Glorious Country

item.title: 1. The Charter Oak
item.description:
A six-part audio companion to The Jiffy Book Club's inaugural selection: "Glorious Country: How the Artist Frederic Church Brought the World to America and America to the World," by Victoria Johnson. Produced by The Jiffy, an independent newsletter and podcast covering the arts and sciences of upstate New York, and hosted by James Cave.
This podcast is an independent project of The Jiffy. It is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or produced in association with the author or publisher.
item.itunes:title: The Charter Oak

item.title: 2. The Cosy Cottage
item.description:
A six-part audio companion to The Jiffy Book Club's inaugural selection: "Glorious Country: How the Artist Frederic Church Brought the World to America and America to the World," by Victoria Johnson. Produced by The Jiffy, an independent newsletter and podcast covering the arts and sciences of upstate New York, and hosted by James Cave.
This podcast is an independent project of The Jiffy. It is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or produced in association with the author or publisher.
item.itunes:title: The Cosy Cottage
